summary: Well-organized test suite covering all core requirements. Tests comprehensively exercise glob pattern matching (*, **, ?), multi-label assignment, priority ordering, group-based conflict resolution, and JSON file I/O. Pester tests validate script functions directly; workflow-structure tests verify CI/CD integration; Run-ActTests.ps1 runs end-to-end scenarios through act. Missing some edge cases: empty rules array, hash-table-based rules (implementation supports both pscustomobject and IDictionary but only PSCustomObject tested), null/empty-string field values, negative priorities, missing rules.json file error handling, malformed JSON. Act output parsing via regex is somewhat brittle and could break if log format changes. No tests for very large inputs, unusual characters, case sensitivity, or concurrent group conflicts with equal priority. Overall, test structure and coverage would catch regressions in typical scenarios and validate the CI/CD pipeline, but lacks exhaustiveness for boundary conditions and unusual error paths.
